gameAiErrorBrowser: The learning helper isn’t ready yet. Set up AI in Sage (desktop or expert API mode).
gameAiWebUnavailable: Dynamic AI on the web requires expert mode with an API or the desktop app.
gameAiErrorInitFailed: The learning helper could not finish starting.
gameAiErrorLead: Nothing is wrong on your side. You can try again in a moment.
gameAiRequiredTitle: This game uses the optional AI helper
gameConsentAiNotice: This game uses optional AI. If you accept, {model} (~{mb} MB) downloads from Hugging Face.
gameCrashedLead: Game player — loading issue. You didn't do anything wrong.
gameDisclaimer: Arborito acts purely as a visualization client. We assume no responsibility for content generated by third-party AI providers.
gameOfflineMissing: No offline copy saved. Play online once first.
gameRecommendedHint: Recommended interactive practice for this topic.
gameRecommendedHintFallback: Recommended interactive practice for this topic.
gameStorageFullWarn: Storage full. Delete old saves in the Arcade menu.
